CRM automation for amoCRM: leads, contac: CRM automation for amoCRM: leads, contacts, companies, tasks and more.
To generate a long-lived token:

1. In amoCRM, go to **Settings -> Integrations**.
2. Create a private integration (or open an existing one).
3. Open the **Keys and access** tab and copy the long-lived token.

Your **Subdomain** is the part before `.amocrm.ru` in your account URL (e.g. `mycompany` for `mycompany.amocrm.ru`).
Please connect your amoCRM account first: Please connect your amoCRM account first.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.

Creates a task in amoCRM, optionally lin: Creates a task in amoCRM, optionally linked to a lead, contact or company.
Deadline relative to now. Combined with: Deadline relative to now. Combined with the unit below. Ignored if a due date is set.
Absolute deadline. Takes precedence over: Absolute deadline. Takes precedence over the relative offset.

Adds a note to a lead, contact or compan: Adds a note to a lead, contact or company in amoCRM.
Adds tags to a lead, contact or company: Adds tags to a lead, contact or company without removing existing ones.
Removes the specified tags from a lead,: Removes the specified tags from a lead, contact or company, keeping the rest.
Removes every tag from a lead, contact o: Removes every tag from a lead, contact or company.
Links two entities together, e.g. attach: Links two entities together, e.g. attaches a contact or company to a lead.
Removes a link between two entities, e.g: Removes a link between two entities, e.g. detaches a contact or company from a lead.
Searches leads, contacts or companies by: Searches leads, contacts or companies by full-text query and/or a single field filter.
Full-text search across the entity field: Full-text search across the entity fields.
A single top-level field to filter by, e: A single top-level field to filter by, e.g. name, responsible_user_id or id. Custom fields are not supported — use the query.
Maximum number of records to return (max: Maximum number of records to return (max 250).
Starts a salesbot on a lead, contact or: Starts a salesbot on a lead, contact or company.
The id of the salesbot to run (from the: The id of the salesbot to run (from the Salesbot designer in amoCRM).
Searches elements (products, invoices, e: Searches elements (products, invoices, etc.) inside an amoCRM catalog (list).
Full-text search across the catalog elem: Full-text search across the catalog elements.
Links a catalog element (e.g. a product): Links a catalog element (e.g. a product) to a lead with an optional quantity.
Removes the link between a catalog eleme: Removes the link between a catalog element (e.g. a product) and a lead.
Changes the responsible user of a lead,: Changes the responsible user of a lead, contact or company, optionally cascading the change to linked entities and open tasks.
Assign a randomly picked active account: Assign a randomly picked active account user instead of a specific one.
